description: Managed Linode settings update: shared id + ssh.access rejections and the PUT body once confirmed. Confirm-gate and missing-ssh text diverge (see report).

cases.name: rejects non-positive linode_id
cases.expect_error: linode_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This updates Managed Linode settings. Set confirm=true to proceed.
